summary.title: Hub auto-syncs before rebuilding
summary.what: Add "hub export" and "hub open" to autoSyncCommands so both subcommands fetch and rebuild before regenerating the static site. Subcommand lookup keyed on parent.Name()+" "+leaf so cobra leaf names cant collide.
summary.why: The hub builds a static snapshot of the local intent view. A stale view means the index page shows team-idle when someone just shipped — exactly the failure mode that put status/check/gaps into autoSyncCommands. Hub belongs in the same set.

decisions.rationale: cmd.Name() alone returns the leaf only ("export"/"open") and would collide if another top-level command ever used those names; full paths in the map remove the ambiguity

risks: On a repo with no remote, the auto-sync will print Syncing with team... then fail; the hub still builds against the local view per the existing failsafe path.

anti_patterns.what: Adding subcommand names directly to autoSyncCommands without the parent path
anti_patterns.why: collides on Name() and silently auto-syncs unrelated commands if another tree adds an export/open subcommand later

followups: Audit context, list-proposals for the same staleness pattern — flagged in the existing autoSyncCommands comment as "Same case as status arguably applies"
